title: New parent in the metro
description: You just had a kid in a busy metro city and need a five-seater that ferries the family without making weekend parking a nightmare. Top safety and an automatic gearbox for stop-go traffic are non-negotiable.
highlights: Five seats with ISOFIX child-seat mounts
Under 4m length so metro parking stays easy

title: First-time buyer in Tier 2/3
tagline: Cheap to run, easy to fix anywhere
description: You're upgrading from a two-wheeler in a smaller town. The car needs to be cheap, sip fuel, and have a service centre on every other street so a roadside breakdown isn't a disaster.
highlights: Service network in every district town
Light clutch and easy controls for new drivers

title: Weekend warrior
description: Weekdays you potter through traffic, but on Friday night you hit broken roads and ghats with mates. You want SUV stance, decent ground clearance and an automatic so you can sip coffee while crawling out of the city.

title: Highway commuter
tagline: Cruise home in comfort, every single day
description: You rack up 60-80km on highway every day. You want a refined diesel or hybrid, an automatic for the daily slog, and the kind of seats that don't leave your back screaming at 9pm.
highlights: Long-haul comfort seats and big boot

title: Young pro, flying solo
tagline: Looks-first daily — sharp, slick, low maintenance
description: Single, mid-twenties, working in a Tier-1 city. You don't need seven seats — you need a sharp-looking petrol automatic that screams 'I made it' in the office basement.
highlights: Compact enough for valet parking anywhere
Designs that turn heads at the office

title: Premium upgrader
tagline: Stepping up — the next car is the statement
description: You've owned a hatchback for six years. The next car must feel like a clear upgrade — German build, 5-star safety, and an SUV or sedan that looks at home in a five-star valet line.
highlights: Powerful turbo-petrol or refined diesel automatic
